SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="180" viewbox="0 0 180 180" width="180" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M123.861 87.0748L116.78 150H62.2568L55.1735 87.0748L59.9198 86.5405L66.5242 145.222H112.51L
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="bg-primary text-white py-8 padding" id="headerNav"> <div class="wrapper flex justify-between items-center"> <div class="logo relative z-auto sm:z-50 w-[100px] overflow-hidden sm:w-[250px]"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="hidden w-full fixed top-0 left-0 z-40 text-primary h-full bg-white overflow-y-scroll" id="headerPrimary"> <div class="wrapper flex flex-col md:flex-row"> <div class="md:
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-73 wp-custom-logo wp-embed-responsive wp-theme-florohamntheme"> <header> <nav class="bg-primary text-white py-8 padding" id="headerNav"> <di
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-primary">Fees and charges</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="bg-primary text-white py-8 padding" id="headerNav"> <div class="wrapper flex justify-between items-center"> <div class="logo relative z-auto sm:z-50 w-[100px] overflow-hidden sm:w-[250px]"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="hidden w-full fixed top-0 left-0 z-40 text-primary h-full bg-white overflow-y-scroll" id="headerPrimary"> <div class="wrapper flex flex-col md:flex-row"> <div class="md:
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="bg-primary text-white py-8 padding" id="headerNav"> <div class="wrapper flex justify-between items-center"> <div class="logo relative z-auto sm:z-50 w-[100px] overflow-hidden sm:w-[250px]"
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

python checker.py https://florahavn.no --max-pages 21 --format html
